<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen -->

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, iOS 17]

- API URL: [e.g., localhost, staging, production]

**Frontend:**

- Package Manager: [e.g., npm 10, yarn 4]
